products.name: Premium Garden Soil Mix
products.description: A rich, well-balanced blend of composted organic matter, perlite and natural minerals. Ideal for garden beds, raised beds and mixed plantings.

products.name: Vegie & Herb Mix
products.description: Specially formulated for vegetable gardens and herb beds. Nutrient-rich with added trace elements to support healthy food production.

products.name: Native Soil Blend
products.description: A low-phosphorus, free-draining blend specifically designed for Australian native plants. Prevents phosphorus toxicity in sensitive species.

products.name: Raised Bed Mix
products.description: Premium blend engineered for raised garden beds and planter boxes. Provides excellent drainage, aeration and long-term nutrient supply.

products.name: Hardwood Mulch
products.description: Long-lasting hardwood chip mulch for garden beds. Suppresses weeds, retains moisture and adds a natural, tidy appearance to your garden.

products.name: Pine Bark Chips
products.description: Coarse pine bark chips — ideal for garden beds, pathways and playgrounds. Slowly breaks down to add organic matter to soil.

products.name: Sugar Cane Mulch
products.description: Fine sugar cane straw mulch — excellent for vegetable gardens. Breaks down quickly to improve soil structure and feed beneficial organisms.

products.name: Tea Tree Mulch
products.description: Premium tea tree mulch with natural antifungal properties. Distinctive aroma deters pests while creating a beautiful, uniform garden bed.

products.name: White Quartz Pebbles
products.description: Bright white quartz pebbles — a classic choice for feature gardens, pathways and around pool areas. Clean, washed and ready to use.

products.name: River Pebbles (Mixed)
products.description: Naturally rounded river pebbles in mixed warm tones. Beautiful for garden beds, water features, driveways and drainage areas.

products.name: Blue Metal 10mm
products.description: Angular blue-grey metal aggregate in 10mm size. Commonly used for drainage, concrete aggregate, driveways and under-slab applications.

products.name: Decomposed Granite
products.description: Warm golden decomposed granite — perfect for contemporary garden paths, dry creek beds and low-maintenance garden mulching.

products.name: Concrete Paver 400×400
products.description: Standard 400×400×40mm concrete pavers in light grey. Suitable for patios, garden paths, stepping stones and general landscaping applications.

products.name: Sandstone Stepping Stones
products.description: Natural sandstone stepping stones in warm honey tones. Each piece is unique, perfect for natural garden paths and feature areas.

products.name: Steel Garden Edging 1.8m
products.description: Galvanised steel garden edging for clean, professional border definition. Flexible enough for curves, strong enough to last decades.

products.name: Premium Potting Mix
products.description: Australian Standard Premium (AS3743) potting mix. Well-aerated, free-draining blend for pots, planters and containers of all types.

products.name: Compost & Worm Castings
products.description: Fully composted organic matter enriched with worm castings. A powerful soil conditioner and natural fertiliser for any garden.

products.name: Slow-Release Fertiliser
products.description: Complete slow-release fertiliser granules for garden beds and lawns. 6-month formula with trace elements for sustained, healthy growth.

products.name: Heavy-Duty Wheelbarrow 100L
products.description: Professional 100L steel tray wheelbarrow with pneumatic tyre. Built for heavy landscaping work — handles bulk materials with ease.

products.name: D-Handle Spade
products.description: Forged steel D-handle spade for digging, edging and moving soil. Ergonomic grip reduces fatigue during extended use.

products.name: Weed Matting 1m × 10m
products.description: Heavy-duty woven weed matting. Water and air permeable, blocks sunlight to suppress weeds for 10+ years. UV stabilised.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Garden Soil
bulkMaterials.description: Premium garden soil blend — rich in organic matter, suitable for garden beds, lawn preparation and landscaping fill.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Turf Blend
bulkMaterials.description: Premium turf underlay blend with added sand and fertiliser. Ideal for laying new lawns and top dressing established turf.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Hardwood Mulch
bulkMaterials.description: Coarse hardwood chip mulch for large-scale garden beds, parks and landscaping projects. Excellent coverage and weed suppression.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Pine Bark
bulkMaterials.description: Screened pine bark mulch in various grades. Suitable for garden beds, playgrounds and natural pathways.

bulkMaterials.name: Washed Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Clean washed concrete sand, free of clay and impurities. Suitable for concrete mixing, plastering and general construction.

bulkMaterials.name: Coarse Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Coarse-grade washed sand for drainage applications, garden soil improvement and general landscaping use.

bulkMaterials.name: Brickie's Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Fine plasticity sand for bricklaying, block laying and mortar applications. Consistent particle size for reliable mixes.

bulkMaterials.name: Blue Metal 10mm
bulkMaterials.description: Clean 10mm blue metal aggregate for concrete mixing, drainage, under-slab applications and driveway construction.

bulkMaterials.name: Blue Metal 20mm
bulkMaterials.description: 20mm blue metal aggregate for road base, drainage and concrete applications where larger aggregate is specified.

bulkMaterials.name: Crusher Dust
bulkMaterials.description: Fine crushed aggregate — ideal for compacting under pavers, paths and as a levelling base. Binds firmly when compacted and dampened.

bulkMaterials.name: River Gravel
bulkMaterials.description: Rounded river gravel in warm natural tones. Beautiful for feature gardens, water features, dry creek beds and large decorative areas.
